creator: freebsdbug@patpro.net
text:
I'm trying to install sqwebmail-5.8.3_1 on FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE, but it conflicts with courier-imap-4.16.2_1,2 as shown in the make install error:

===>   Registering installation for sqwebmail-5.8.3_1
Installing sqwebmail-5.8.3_1...
pkg-static: sqwebmail-5.8.3_1 conflicts with courier-imap-4.16.2_1,2 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/man/man1/maildirmake.1.gz
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/sqwebmail
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/sqwebmail
